content.text:
All 41 tests pass.

🟢 Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added count-based validation in the claim step. Built a map of item counts from `policy.items` and a map of damage counts from `step.incident.damages`. If any damage-type count exceeds its policy-type count, write to stderr and exit 1.
**Result**: All 41 tests now pass (was 40, now 41 with the new test passing).
**Approach**: Minimal placement right after the existing damage-validation checks, mirroring the same stderr-write + exit(1) pattern already used for other validation errors. No refactoring of surrounding code; just added the smallest block needed to satisfy this test.

Relevant file:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_03-50-02_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/cli.ts

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
